title: Summary: Turn 786
content: The project is a Java 8 knowledge base engine that uses LLM to extract concepts and relations from multimedia (images, video, audio, docs) and visualizes the knowledge graph via a React frontend with Cytoscape.js, backed by H2/JSON storage. It follows a Gather → Build → Infer Relations → Visualise pipeline, with config files (`llm-config.json`, `inference-config.json`) and PowerShell scripts for full-stack start/stop.
